channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live

item.title: Comment is Freed: Why do prime ministers keep failing? - Comment is Freed
item.description: Why do prime ministers keep failing? - Comment is Freed

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: FT UK Politics: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
item.description: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Who could replace Starmer as prime minister? Here are the top contenders for a Labour leadership battle
item.description: Who could replace Starmer as prime minister? Here are the top contenders for a Labour leadership battle

item.title: The Telegraph: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph
item.description: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph

item.title: FT UK Politics: No good outcomes for Starmer
FT UK Politics: Labour set to approve Andy Burnham’s by-election run
item.description: Labour set to approve Andy Burnham’s by-election run

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Makerfield voted 65% Leave in 2016 (the 75th most Leave seat). Over the next few weeks, there’ll be plenty of news coverage about Brexit (reset negotiations, 10th anniversary). Andy Burnham is a rejoiner. If Reform ca...
item.description: Makerfield voted 65% Leave in 2016 (the 75th most Leave seat). Over the next few weeks, there’ll be plenty of news coverage about Brexit (reset negotiations, 10th anniversary). Andy Burnham is a rejoiner. If Reform ca...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: If you totted up the sums for every financial scandal in British politics (£2k per parliamentary question for cash-for-questions, £200k for Johnson’s No 10 renovation, the cost of that very nice campervan) even with s...
